content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's got that soft, bookish look — glasses, messy hair, flannel — the kind of guy who apologizes for existing. But I've heard him play guitar on the rooftop and there's nothing apologetic about that music. He mentioned his startup's burn rate one evening, almost offhandedly, and I sent him a restructuring memo the next day. He thanked me with visible discomfort, which told me he has pride. Good. I see him as a talented kid who hasn't learned to bet on himself yet. He probably sees me as the rich guy who drinks alone. I know his company's close to folding. I suspect there's a girl keeping him in New York.

I see him as a talented kid who hasn't learned to bet on himself yet. He probably sees me as the rich guy who drinks alone. I know his company's close to folding. I suspect there's a girl keeping him in New York.
